comments.body:
I’m wondering where the sun got that information about them being married for over a year now. Because other sources are backing Miranda, saying that they’ve only been married since July 6 of this year.

The Sun does not specify why they are giving the date of over a year, and they don’t give a source. So, I have my doubts about it.

Since tabloids will exploit any minute detail to make a story from, and as competitive as these papers are, it does indeed seem dodgy The Sun would be the only one, that I've seen, that the 'married for a year' angle has been brought up about Miranda's marriage.
